changes.value:
Create the shelltool-cli crate with the MCP server.

## Structure
- shelltool-cli/Cargo.toml — [[bin]] name = "shelltool", [package.metadata.dist] formula = "shelltool", workspace fields, deps on swissarmyhammer-tools, swissarmyhammer-shell, swissarmyhammer-common, rmcp, clap, tokio, tracing
- shelltool-cli/src/main.rs — clap dispatch, banner on interactive help
- shelltool-cli/src/cli.rs — Cli struct with Commands: Serve, Init, Deinit, Doctor
- shelltool-cli/src/serve.rs — minimal stdio MCP server hosting only ShellExecuteTool via rmcp

## Also
- Add "shelltool-cli" to root Cargo.toml workspace members
- build.rs using build-support/doc_gen.rs for markdown, manpages, completions
- Build deps: clap, clap-markdown, clap_mangen, clap_complete

## Acceptance
- `cargo build -p shelltool-cli` succeeds
- `shelltool serve` starts MCP stdio server with shell tool
- `shelltool --help` shows all subcommands
shelltool-cli crate: scaffold and serve command
